title: Accessories
description: 7 All new wearable bracelets, each with it's own powers and other features too!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa87edcc2ee0c4f6b9287a913ef26c0af318547a.png)

This mod allows you to wear and use 7 new Bracelets, all with their unique and own powers. It is kind of like wearing potions. This mod also adds a new enchantment, Enhancment! Enhancment can only be applied to bracelets, and upgrades the powers of them. Thanks for downloading, and have fun!
